parity.notes: Reference solutions are structurally parallel: Slugify (1), Truncate (two guards, 3), WordCount (split + filter loop, 3). Calor normalizes tab/CR/LF to spaces before splitting (its Split call takes one separator); C# passes multiple separator chars to Split — same complexity count, both first-order. Complexity counted as 1 per function + 1 per branch/loop. NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).
